title: Harden launchd write-skill wrappers: post-run checks + wire enrichment integrity hook
description:
Root-cause write-up: brain/outputs/2026-04-20-target-discovery-phase2-root-cause.md

Sunday 4/19 22:00 ET target-discovery Phase 2 exited 0 without running. Claude agent hallucinated a prior PID 75009 and stood down. No jj-week-pool artifact written; 36 of 40 JJ Monday tabs landed blank in Col K, forcing emergency Apollo rescue.

Scope:
- Layer 1 (2 hr) — add POST_RUN_CHECK to scripts/run-skill.sh that runs a validator after Claude exits 0 and overrides success if validator fails. Target-discovery-sunday gets enrichment_integrity_check.py wired.
- Layer 2 (2-3 hr) — ship .claude/skills/target-discovery/headless-phase2-prompt.md; launchd passes mode=phase2-sunday and wrapper selects the prompt.
- Layer 3 (30 min) — update SKILL.md Step 5 to require hook invocation as last action before 'done'.
- Layer 4 (3-4 hr) — apply post-run-check pattern to jj-operations-sunday, nightly-tracker-audit, weekly-tracker, relationship-manager.

Total: 6-9 hr. Schedule on Friday tech-debt block.

Dependencies: none.
Assignee: agent.
Labels: launchd, target-discovery, reliability, post-mortem.
